exampleContent.sectionSubtitle: Real prompts and articles from this template

prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your addiction recovery forward
items: Research and contact 3 medically supervised detox facilities or programs in your area
Complete a comprehensive substance use assessment with a licensed addiction counselor or medical professional
Create a detailed list of all substances, medications, and supplements you currently use with exact amounts and frequency
Arrange for someone to stay with you or monitor you during the first 72 hours of detox
Remove all substances and related paraphernalia from your living space and identify potential triggers
Establish a medication schedule with your doctor for any prescribed detox medications or withdrawal management drugs
